issues.message: Missing event callback props. GraphProps extends Partial<TGraphEventCallbacks>, which adds 10 optional event callback props: click, dblclick, onCameraChange, onBlockDragStart, onBlockDrag, onBlockDragEnd, onBlockSelectionChange, onBlockAnchorSelectionChange, onBlockChange, onConnectionSelectionChange, onStateChanged. These are spread via ...cbs and forwarded to useGraphEvents. None are listed in the data file.
Prop 'position' is marked required:true but has a default value of 'fixed' (source: position = "fixed" in destructuring). Since callers can omit it, it should be required:false with default:"fixed".
Component supports forwardRef (ref?: React.Ref<HTMLDivElement>) but ref is not listed as a prop in the data file. This is standard React forwardRef behavior and may be intentionally omitted.
Component supports forwardRef (ref?: React.Ref<GraphPortalLayer>) but ref is not listed as a prop in the data file. This is standard React forwardRef behavior and may be intentionally omitted.
Description says 'Internal memo component' which is accurate, but this is an implementation detail of BlocksList. Consider whether it should be documented as a public component since it is exported.

Return type listed as 'ViewComponent | undefined' but the source returns the result of blockState?.getViewComponent() which is the view component instance. The actual return type depends on the ViewComponent type from the block's view system. Description is acceptable but imprecise.
